mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value was 387117 as of one month before 2011-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in 50% or fewer walk-forward instances, or if its 3-year rolling Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 9.0%, persistent labor-market slack signals weak income growth and rising earnings-risk premia, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 9.1 as of one month before 2011-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations generate positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases, or if triggered average returns are not below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: At the zero lower bound, a federal funds rate below 0.25% combined with rising consumer prices lowers real short rates and supports equity valuation multiples, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 0.09 as of one month before 2011-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction state has a negative 20-day average forward return over walk-forward tests, or if the interaction term adds no predictive power beyond FEDFUNDS alone.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production combined with weak payroll growth signals a synchronized output and employment slowdown that reduces expected earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month growth crosses below 0% while PAYEMS 3-month growth is below 0.2%
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value was 92.9815 as of one month before 2011-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered cases do not underperform unconditional 20-day S&P 500 returns by at least 50 basis points on average in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts below 600 thousand annualized units signal a depressed residential investment channel and constrained household balance sheets, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value was 523 as of two months before 2011-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-below-600 observations have 60-day S&P 500 returns equal to or above the unconditional mean, or if the negative hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the effective federal funds rate tightens financial conditions and increases discount rates applied to future cash flows, producing lower S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 0.09 as of one month before 2011-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if increases in FEDFUNDS are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward cases, or if the 5-day Rank IC is nonnegative.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth during unemployment above 9.0% signals demand resilience without immediate wage-pressure tightening, supporting earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE was 9.1 and RSAFS was 387117 in the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the joint state fails to outperform high-UNRATE observations without RSAFS growth by at least 50 basis points over the next 20 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth signals broad demand expansion and improving aggregate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as earnings expectations adjust.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value was 13441.9 as of five months before 2011-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth is not associated with higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than nonpositive GDPC1 growth in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03.
